overview: A female detective'Chigusa'invades the organization's hideout to recover the data of the secret information file stolen by the terrorist organization. However, he is caught one step further. On the contrary, Chigusa who was detained is tortured by being questioned for the ID for opening the data. Chigusa's big breasts and Mako who are desperate will soon reach the limit, but Chigusa's mouth has unexpected words.
